meaning: n.屠宰,残杀,屠杀v.屠宰,残杀,屠杀
examples: The animals are stunned before slaughter.
The slaughter of whales is unnecessary and inhuman.
Lack of chicken feed means that chicken farms are having to slaughter their stock.
N1 was contained only after the slaughter of 160, 000 fowl at a large Suffolk farm.
"The Raid" from Indonesia combines SWAT-team-versus-gangster slaughter with a discipline of martial arts called silat.
